help.cheats:
Cheats for this game.

The list is downloaded from the cheats database for your exact game version. Tap a cheat to toggle it on or off, then press X to save. Enabled cheats are applied by Atmosphère the next time you launch the game (hold L while booting it to open the cheat menu).

If nothing shows up, there are no cheats for this game/version yet.
help.mods:
Mods for this game.

Use "Import from SD" to install a .zip/.7z/.rar you dropped in the mods _incoming folder, or "Get mods" to browse GameBanana. Only one mod can be active per game at a time — toggle the one you want. Uninstall removes a mod from the SD card.

Mods are applied via Atmosphère's LayeredFS the next time you launch the game.
help.saves:
Save backups for this game.

Back up copies your current in-game save to the SD card. Restore writes a chosen backup back over your save — the running game must be closed first. The history list shows every backup with its date. If you're signed in, saves can also sync to the cloud.
help.cheats_list:
Pick a game to manage its cheats.

This lists the games installed on your console. Choose one to download and toggle cheats for it. Cheats are applied by Atmosphère when you launch the game.
help.mods_list:
Pick a game to manage its mods.

This lists the games installed on your console. Choose one to import, download or enable mods for it. Mods are applied via Atmosphère's LayeredFS when you launch the game.
help.saves_list:
Pick a game to back up or restore its save.

This lists the games installed on your console with the date of their last backup. Choose one to copy its save to the SD card (or cloud) and restore it later.
